rows.notes: Selected from gemini-flash, as it correctly identifies '1805' as the first chronological header for the ledger entries.

rows.description: Soluta Varia
rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors for this header row.

rows.description: Nov. 14 Mr Charlton (by Dr Cole) for surveying Tintinhall
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's transcription of description and amounts (5 | 0 | 0), with clear dashes for shillings and pence. Gpt-5-mini had incorrect amounts (5 | 5 | 8).

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Charlton for surveying Tintinhall, amounting to £5 0s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of taxes to St Michael's Parish, amounting to £1 11s 8d.

rows.description: - 23 Mr Tauntons Bill /23.13.1/ paid by Order, with 30-
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's transcription of description and amounts (39 | 9 | 0.5). Pounds is '39', shillings '9', and pence column shows a dash with a clear half-penny symbol. Gpt-5-mini appears to have confused the '30-' in the description text with the pounds amount, and missed the half-penny.
rows.english_description: Payment of Mr Taunton's bill (amount noted), paid by order; record mentions an accompanying thirty (unclear further context).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Mr Taunton's bill paid by order, amounting to £39 9s 0.5d.
